svg.text: PostgreSQL 15 | 11 Tables | Centered on Users Entity

g.text: USERS is the central entity connecting all operations: Authentication (sessions, roles), Transactions (orders), and Diagnostics (logs, audit, analytics)
All relationships are One-to-Many (1:N). PK = Primary Key uniquely identifies rows | FK = Foreign Key references another table

Business Flow: Users login (sessions) - Place orders - Order items tracked - KDS processes kitchen prep | Diagnostics: Every user action logged in application_logs and api_audit_log with request correlation via request_id
For Production Debugging: Use application_logs for error traces, api_audit_log for performance metrics, analytics_events for behavior analysis. Correlate via user_id and request_id fields.
Total: 11 Tables | 45+ Columns | 15+ Indexes | All timestamps UTC | Cascading deletes maintain referential integrity

svg.text: ByteBite Debugging Lab | ERD v3.0 | Users-Centric Design for Production Failure Analysis
